statement.en: Towards dietary optimization for patients with Parkinson's disease : insights from a phase II, crossover, randomized controlled trial of two Mediterranean-ketogenic dietary interventions
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a pre-publication thesis (embargo status) reporting provisional clinical trial results. The work describes a phase II RCT with specific dietary interventions, but: (1) full abstract is unavailable, (2) embargo indicates unpublished/unvalidated state, (3) phase II trials are exploratory and not confirmatory, (4) dietary intervention efficacy claims require peer review and phase III validation. Classification as FLOWING reflects active-research status pending publication and external validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 揺らぎが消えるのは、脂肪の炎と地中海の根が時間を織り直すから。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 二つの道が一つの根から生え、中心で静寂と出会う。
